name: Halla Holdings Corp.
summary: Halla Holdings Corp. engages in the automobile, construction, and education/sports businesses in South Korea and internationally. The company offers automobile parts. It also operates a port terminal; a university; an ice hockey club; and a golf club. The company was formerly known as Mando Corporation and changed its name to Halla Holdings Corp. in October 2014. Halla Holdings Corp. was founded in 1962 and is based in Seoul, South Korea.
